properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 36/15

SRV POLAR DUCHESS WILL BE CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY AT THE FOLLOWING POSITION: 

A. 70-48.4N 020-12.2E 
B. 70-35.2N 018.27.8E 
C. 70-41.4N 018-07.8E 
D. 72-07.3N 020-00.2E 
E  72-01.5N 021-48.3E 

WITH 12 STREAMER CABLES OF  7050 METERS LONG. 
REQUEST WIDE BERTH OF 5NM ASTERN, 2NM AHEAD, AND 2NM ABEAM OF THE VESSEL.

TWO SUPPORT VESSEL IN ATTENDANCE :  
1)  CASSANDRA VI                                                 2)  7 OCEANS
